message:
feat: series arithmetic, constructors, join/concat, and alien artifact enhancements

Alien Graveyard (AG) enhancements:
- AG-12: HyperLogLog sketch and CountMin sketch in fp-columnar
- AG-13: Adaptive Radix Tree index in fp-columnar
- AG-14: Database cracking (CrackIndex) in fp-columnar
- Sketching-backed approximate distinct in fp-groupby
- OnceCell memoization for has_duplicates in fp-index

Phase-2C Packet Execution:
- bd-2gi.14: Series sub/mul/div via generic binary_op_with_policy
- bd-2gi.12: DataFrame::from_dict, Series::from_pairs/broadcast, select_columns
- bd-2gi.17: concat_dataframes in fp-frame, merge_dataframes with hash-join in fp-join

292 tests pass, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
